changes: Shield Swipe potency reduced from 150 to 100.
Holy Spirit potency reduced from 400 to 380.
Heavy Swing potency increased from 150 to 160.
Skull Sunder combo potency increased from 200 to 210.
Berserk effect changed from 'Increases attack power by 30%' to 'Guarantees that all attacks are critical and direct hits.'
Berserk duration changed from 20 to 10 seconds.
Berserk recast time increased from 60 to 90 seconds.
Overpower potency increased from 120 to 130.
Tomahawk potency increased from 130 to 140.
Maim combo potency increased from 190 to 200.
Butcher's Block combo potency increased from 280 to 300.
Storm's Path combo potency increased from 270 to 280.
Vengeance reflected damage potency increased from 50 to 55.
Storm's Eye damage increase changed from 20% to 10%.
Storm's Eye combo potency increased from 270 to 280.
Unchained no longer shares recast timer with Inner Release.
Unchained recast time reduced from 120 to 90 seconds.
Steel Cyclone HP absorption reduced.
Inner Release no longer shares recast timer with Unchained.
Inner Release recast time reduced from 120 to 90 seconds.
Inner Release duration reduced from 20 to 10 seconds.
Inner Release effect 'Halves Beast Gauge costs...' changed to 'Allows the use of Beast Gauge actions without cost...'
Inner Release added effect: Guarantees that all attacks are critical and direct hits.
Inner Release can now be used while Defiance is active; no longer changes to Unchained.
Fell Cleave potency increased from 500 to 520.
New level 70 trait: Berserk Mastery (upgrades Berserk to Inner Release).
Delirium recast time reduced from 120 to 80 seconds.
The Blackest Night effect duration increased from 5 to 7 seconds.
Mantra recast time reduced from 120 to 90 seconds.
Perfect Balance recast time reduced from 180 to 60 seconds.
Wind Tackle duration of Riddle of Wind increased from 5 to 10 seconds.
Riddle of Wind now grants Greased Lightning for 16 seconds.
Brotherhood effect now also applies to the user.
Rook Autoturret Hypercharge damage taken reduction reduced from 6% to 5%.
Bishop Autoturret Hypercharge damage taken reduction reduced from 6% to 5%.
Transpose recast time reduced from 12 to 8 seconds.
Thunder (all grades) Thundercloud effect duration increased from 12 to 18 seconds.
Fire Firestarter effect duration increased from 12 to 18 seconds.
Aetherial Manipulation recast time reduced from 30 to 10 seconds.
Fire IV potency increased from 260 to 280.
Tri-bind potency while under Dreadwyrm Trance reduced from 100 to 70.
Painflare potency reduced from 200 to 180.
Ruin III potency reduced from 130 to 120.
Wyrmwave potency reduced from 160 to 150.
Divine Benison: Healing Lily requirement removed.
Excogitation now restores HP when duration expires if HP does not fall below 50%.
The Spear effect duration increased from 20 to 30 seconds.
Earthly Star: Ground targeting cursor now indicates area of effect.
Interject: Silence effect applied more quickly.
Diversion: Enmity generation reduction improved.
Diversion: Effect duration increased from 15 to 30 seconds.
Head Graze: Silence effect applied more quickly.
Shield Oath: Damage reduction effect changed from 25% to 20%. Damage dealt reduction changed from 25% to 20%.
Clemency: Healing potency increased from 2,000 to 3,000.
Shield Bash: TP cost reduced from 300 to 250. Added effect: Increases Oath Gauge by 5.
Inner Release: Added as a new action. Halves Beast Gauge costs and nullifies Stun, Sleep, Bind, Heavy, Slow, Silence, and knockback effects. Duration: 10s.
Upheaval: Action removed.
Defiance: Maximum HP increase effect changed from 25% to 20%. HP recovered via healing magic effect changed from 25% to 20%. Damage dealt reduction changed from 25% to 20%.
Tomahawk: TP cost reduced from 300 to 250.
Thrill of War: Effect changed to restore HP of self and nearby party members by 20% of maximum HP.
Grit: Damage reduction effect changed from 25% to 20%. Damage dealt reduction changed from 25% to 20%.
Low Blow: TP cost reduced from 300 to 250.
HP increased from 13,000 to 13,500.
The Forbidden Chakra: Potency increased from 2,000 to 2,500.
HP increased from 13,000 to 13,500.
Jump: TP cost reduced from 400 to 300.
Geirskogul: Potency increased from 1,500 to 2,000.
HP increased from 12,500 to 13,000.
Raiton: Potency increased from 1,500 to 1,750.
HP increased from 12,500 to 13,000.
HP increased from 11,500 to 12,500.
Sidewinder: Potency increased from 250 to 500; potency with Caustic Bite/Stormbite increased from 750 to 1,000; potency with both increased from 1,250 to 1,500.
The Wanderer's Minuet: Potency increased from 500 to 1,000.
Army's Paeon: Potency increased from 500 to 1,000.
Repelling Shot: TP cost reduced from 300 to 250.
HP increased from 11,500 to 12,500.
Between the Eyes: Potency when target is under Bind, Stun, or Sleep increased to triple normal potency.
Wildfire: Damage compiled increased from 25% to 50%; duration reduced from 7 to 5 seconds.
Flamethrower: Damage over time potency increased from 400 to 500.
Blank: TP cost reduced from 300 to 250.
HP increased from 11,000 to 12,000.
Sleep: MP cost reduced from 1,500 to 1,000.
HP increased from 11,000 to 12,000.
Akh Morn: Potency increased from 1,500 to 2,000.
Tri-bind: MP cost reduced from 1,500 to 1,000.
Manafication: Added as new action. Doubles current Black/White Mana; resets Corps-a-corps and Displacement recast timers.
Monomachy: Action removed.
HP increased from 11,000 to 12,000.
Corps-a-corps: Additional effect removed.
Displacement: Additional effect removed.
Verstone: Potency increased from 750 to 1,000.
Verfire: Potency increased from 750 to 1,000.
Jolt II: Potency increased from 1,000 to 1,250.
Vercure: Added effect: Increases White/Black Mana by 5.
HP increased from 13,500 to 14,000.
Regen: Healing potency reduced from 1,500 to 1,250; MP cost reduced from 750 to 500.
HP increased from 13,500 to 14,000.
HP increased from 13,500 to 14,000.

new_content.name: An Auspicious Encounter
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Return to the Rift
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: An Unwanted Truth
new_content.description: Side story quest for The Fractal Continuum (Hard).

new_content.name: Passion for Fashion
new_content.description: Quest to unlock The Fashion Report.

new_content.name: Duty Recorder
new_content.description: System to document duties for later viewing.

new_content.name: The Fashion Report
new_content.description: A new challenge at the Gold Saucer for judging player outfits.

new_content.name: PvP Team
new_content.description: Feature to form teams for The Feast.

new_content.name: Subaquatic Voyages
new_content.description: A feature allowing free companies to deploy submersibles.

new_content.name: Glamour Dressers and Plates
new_content.description: System to store and apply ensembles to equipment.

housing.name: House Borel Interior Wall
housing.description: A wall that matches the design of those used in Aymeric de Borel's very manor.

housing.name: White Marble Flooring
housing.description: Smooth, elegant floor tiling made of polished marble.

housing.name: Classic Chandelier
housing.description: A lavish light fixture that hearkens to days long past.

housing.name: Corner Hedge Partition
housing.description: A low-growing hedge, expertly pruned and trimmed into the shape of an L.

housing.name: Bamboo Copse
housing.description: A controlled cluster of bamboo cut from a Yanxian forest for display in private gardens.

housing.name: Hingan Hot Spring
housing.description: Scalding water tapped from the very bowels of the land, and collected in a quaint rock pool certain to draw the envy of neighbors.

housing.name: Hedge Partition
housing.description: A low-growing hedge, oft used to create natural barriers around homes.

housing.name: Futon Mattress
housing.description: Common in the Far East, futons are thin down-filled mattresses laid directly on the floor instead of upon a frame.

housing.name: Byakko Throne
housing.description: A regal throne, fit for a king...or emperor that also happens to be a giant white tiger.

housing.name: Open Partition
housing.description: A low partition cut with a hole to provide estates with the illusion of more space than actually exists.

housing.name: Carbuncle Bathtub
housing.description: A small tub crafted to resemble a summoner's best friend. Just large enough for two.

housing.name: Stage Panel
housing.description: A large white panel used by acting troupes as a simple backdrop for plays.

housing.name: Hingan Pillar
housing.description: A decorative pillar designed in the Hingan fashion.

housing.name: Byakko Sideboard
housing.description: A round desk carved to resemble Byakko, one of the mystic Four Lords of the Far East.

housing.name: Counter Cart
housing.description: An island for kitchens designed to resemble those carts used by hawkers in city markets.

housing.name: Bomb Stove
housing.description: A cast-iron wood stove designed after a fateful encounter with a voidsent bomb.

housing.name: Mummer's Wardrobe
housing.description: An oversized locker used by mummers to house not only their costumes, but their various tools of the trade.

housing.name: Crimson Coral Object
housing.description: A chunk of rare crimson coral mounted for display on your desk, sideboard, mantle, or commode.

housing.name: Odder Otter Lantern
housing.description: An indoor lantern designed to resemble the oddest of otters.

housing.name: Season Six Lone Wolf Trophy
housing.description: A trophy awarded to those who "left their mark" in Season Six of the Feast.

housing.name: Bread Basket
housing.description: Aromatic loaves of freshly baked bread fill this wicker basket to the brim.

housing.name: Stuffed Alpha
housing.description: A charming recreation of the chocobo Alpha, filled with the feathers of a fowl less fortunate.

housing.name: House Borel Tea Set
housing.description: A faithful replication of the selfsame set used every morning by Aymeric de Borel himself.

housing.name: Royal Dowager Tea Set
housing.description: The design used on this quaint porcelain tea set is based off a passage in an ancient literary work on Halicarnassus.

housing.name: Vegetable Basket
housing.description: The vegetables contained within this basket have not been approved for consumption.

housing.name: Chirurgeon's Essentials
housing.description: From scalpels to saws, panaceas to placebos, this basic set of medical devices has everything the unlicensed surgeon needs.

housing.name: Stuffed Ananta
housing.description: Those without a deathly fear of snakes claim this plush doll to be one of the most beautiful ever crafted.

housing.name: Tier 1 Metal Aquarium
housing.description: A small, reinforced glass tank that, when filled with water, can serve as a home for select wavekin caught in the wild.

housing.name: Tier 2 Metal Aquarium
housing.description: A reinforced glass tank that, when filled with water, can serve as a home for select wavekin caught in the wild.

housing.name: Eorzean Lantern
housing.description: Not one to be humbled by craftsmen of the East, a prominent Eorzean lamp maker conceived this fixture.

housing.name: Stack of Documents
housing.description: What better way to tell unwanted visitors, "can't you see I'm busy?" than by strewing stacks of important-looking documents?

housing.name: Mummer's Maquillage
housing.description: Countless varieties of rouges, putties, and talcums commonly used by mummers to prepare themselves for their acts.

housing.name: Dress Hanger
housing.description: Because one wouldn't dare hang a dress on a coat hanger.

housing.name: Coat Hanger
housing.description: Because one wouldn't dare hang a coat on a dress hanger.

housing.name: Moogle Wall Chronometer
housing.description: A chronometer carved in the adorable likeness of a moogle.

housing.name: Brick Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall built with genuine kiln-fired bricks.

housing.name: Mounted Cupboard
housing.description: A space-saving cupboard that can be mounted anywhere there is a wall.

housing.name: Kitchen Hanger
housing.description: Save space in your cupboards for liquor and fruitcake by hanging all your kitchen appliances from hooks.

housing.name: Hannya Mask
housing.description: A frightening mask of Far Eastern design. Perfect for children's bedrooms and nurseries.

glamour.name: Glamour Prism (Woodworking)
glamour.description: A new glamour prism item used to cast glamours.

glamour.name: Glamour Prism (Smithing)
glamour.description: A new glamour prism item used to cast glamours.

glamour.name: Glamour Prism (Leatherworking)
glamour.description: A new glamour prism item used to cast glamours.

glamour.name: Glamour Prism (Clothcraft)
glamour.description: A new glamour prism item used to cast glamours.

glamour.name: Glamour Prism (Alchemy)
glamour.description: A new glamour prism item used to cast glamours.

glamour.name: Glamour Prism
glamour.description: This crystalline prism captures the likeness of a piece of equipment and projects it onto another object.
